message:
refactor: replace GT_ROLE parsing with BD_ACTOR in hooks (bd-b4q6)

Remove Gas Town identity infrastructure from beads hooks:
- agentIdentity struct and compound format parsing
- GT_ROLE env var detection, path-based detection
- gt mol status integration (getPinnedMolecule)
- Rig/Role/Molecule commit trailers

Replace with simple BD_ACTOR env var check for Executed-By trailer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
